args: ROOT="$1"; if [ -z "$ROOT" ] || [ "$ROOT" = '${PLUGIN_ROOT}' ]; then ROOT="$2"; fi; if [ -z "$ROOT" ] || [ "$ROOT" = '${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}' ]; then ROOT="$(pwd)"; fi; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/live_bridge.py" ] && [ -f "$ROOT/libreoffice/live_bridge.py" ]; then ROOT="$ROOT/libreoffice"; fi; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/live_bridge.py" ]; then BRIDGE="$(find "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache" -path '*/libreoffice/*/live_bridge.py' -print -quit 2>/dev/null)"; ROOT="${BRIDGE%/live_bridge.py}"; fi; cd "$ROOT" && exec uv run --project "$ROOT" python "$ROOT/live_bridge.py"
